privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Danloo System Privacy Policy - Learn how we protect your personal information and data privacy
privacy.overviewContent: Danloo System ('we', 'this platform') is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information security. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect the information you provide when using our services.
privacy.accountInfoDesc: Basic information such as username and email address provided during registration
privacy.uploadedContentDesc: Your uploaded material files, text content, images, and other data
privacy.usageDataDesc: Your activity records, preferences, and interaction behaviors on the platform
privacy.techInfoDesc: Technical data such as IP address, device information, browser type, etc.
privacy.aiResultsDesc: Content and classification results generated through AI analysis
privacy.infoUsageIntro: We use the collected information to:
privacy.provideImproveService: Provide and improve our AI content analysis services
privacy.processStoreContent: Process and store your uploaded materials
privacy.generateAiResults: Generate AI analysis results and recommendations
privacy.maintainSecurity: Maintain platform security and prevent abuse
privacy.complyLaws: Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
privacy.dataStorageDesc: Your data is stored on secure cloud servers, and we use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your information.
privacy.storagePeriodDesc: We will retain your data based on service needs and legal requirements. You may request the deletion of your account and related data at any time.
privacy.securityMeasuresDesc: We have implemented technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.
privacy.infoSharingIntro: We will not sell, rent, or otherwise disclose your personal information to third parties, unless:
privacy.serviceRequired: Required to provide services (such as AI processing service providers)
privacy.accessInfo: Access and view your personal information
privacy.restrictProcessing: Restrict or object to certain data processing
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.policyUpdatesDesc: We may update this privacy policy periodically. Significant changes will be notified to you through platform notifications or email. Continued use of our services indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactUsIntro: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please contact us:
privacy.footerNote: This privacy policy is formulated in accordance with relevant laws and regulations of the People's Republic of China, including the Personal Information Protection Law, Data Security Law, etc.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Danloo System Terms of Service - Learn about the terms and conditions of using our platform
terms.acceptTermsDesc: Welcome to Danloo System! By accessing or using our services, you agree to abide by these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.serviceDescriptionIntro: Danloo System is an AI-driven content analysis and management platform that provides the following main features:
terms.aiAnalysis: AI-powered analysis of documents and images
terms.protectAccount: You are responsible for protecting your account information and password
terms.responsibleForActivity: You are responsible for all activities conducted through your account
terms.notifyUnauthorized: Notify us immediately if you discover unauthorized access
terms.ownLegalRights: You own all legal rights to all content you upload
terms.noInfringement: Ensure uploaded content does not infringe on others' intellectual property
terms.noIllegalContent: Do not upload illegal, harmful, or inappropriate content
terms.takeLegalResponsibility: Bear legal responsibility arising from uploaded content
terms.prohibitedActionsIntro: When using our services, you must not:
terms.noIllegalContent2: Upload illegal, defamatory, hate speech, or inappropriate content
terms.noInfringement2: Infringe on others' intellectual property, privacy, or other rights
terms.noMalware: Spread malware, viruses, or other harmful code
terms.noUnauthorizedAccess: Attempt to access the system or other user accounts without authorization
terms.noDisruption: Interfere with or disrupt the normal operation of services
terms.noSpam: Engage in commercial promotion or spam dissemination
terms.noOtherIllegal: Other actions that violate relevant laws and regulations
terms.dataCollectionIntro: We collect and store the following types of data:
terms.uploadedMaterials: Documents, images, and other materials you upload
terms.aiClassification: Classification, tags, and summary information generated by AI analysis
terms.usagePreferences: Your usage habits and preference data
terms.provideAnalysisService: Provide AI analysis and content management services
terms.improveAlgorithms: Improve our algorithms and service quality
terms.complyLaws: Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
terms.yourContentDesc: You retain all rights to uploaded content. By using our services, you grant us a license to process, store, and analyze this content to provide services.
terms.ourServiceDesc: Danloo System's software, algorithms, interface design, and related technologies are protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.aiGeneratedContentDesc: Analysis results and recommendations generated through our AI system may be used by you subject to compliance with these terms.
terms.serviceAvailabilityDesc: We strive to maintain stable service operation but do not guarantee 100% uptime. We may suspend services for maintenance, upgrades, or other reasons and will provide advance notice when possible.
terms.accountTerminationIntro: We may suspend or terminate your account in the following situations:
terms.illegalActivity: Engage in illegal or harmful activities
terms.disclaimerDesc: Our services are provided based on current AI technology, and AI analysis results are for reference only. We make no guarantees about the accuracy, completeness, or applicability of AI analysis. Users should use analysis results based on their own judgment.
terms.liabilityLimitationDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the services.
terms.termsModificationDesc: We may update these terms periodically. Significant changes will be notified to you through platform notifications or email. Continued use of services indicates acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.disputeResolutionDesc: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Disputes arising from the use of services should be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, you may file a lawsuit with a competent people's court in Beijing.
terms.contactUsIntro: If you have any questions about these terms of service, please contact us:
terms.footerNote: Thank you for choosing Danloo System, and we are committed to providing you with high-quality AI content analysis services.
